programme.title: 🌊 1.6m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
The 1.6m swell at Ribeira might offer a ride or two before the crosswind turns it into a washing machine.
🌊 Swell: 1.6m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 11.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 30.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.3m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
1.7m and onshore; the Atlantic's just mocking us with slightly organized slop today.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h SSW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 1.7m and a crosswind like that, you're mostly going to get wet today.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With a 1.7m swell and that wind, it'll be a closeout rodeo out there today.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.title: 🌊 1.7m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:
With 1.7m and a crosswind, Cantinho today offers a chance to either catch a wave or just get tumbled around a bit.
🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h SSW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m

programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.7m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 14.0km/h SSW (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 27.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
📋 Clean conditions with offshore wind

programme.title: 🌊 2.4m @ 11s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 2.4m swell and cross-shore breeze suggests a washing machine with occasional opportunities for brief glory, or maybe just survival.
🌊 Swell: 2.4m @ 11s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 31.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.4m

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 2.3m @ 12s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
Supertubos might offer a few decent 2-meter wedges today, provided the wind cooperates and doesn't chop them to bits.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m

programme.title: 🌊 2.3m @ 12s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
Yeah, good luck with those 2.3m wind-slop burgers; might be more exercise than fun today.
🌊 Swell: 2.3m @ 12s 💨 Wind: 19.0km/h N (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 32.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.1m
